notes: Single source of truth for Tier 1 AI referral detection. No domain lists in Python code. Matching is undercount-safe by design: when a domain would also match non-AI traffic, it is left out and the miss is absorbed by the undercount disclosure.

platforms.label: Google Gemini
platforms.notes: Deliberately scoped to the gemini/bard subdomains. Bare google.com must never match.

platforms.label: DuckDuckGo AI
platforms.notes: duckduckgo.com is deliberately excluded: its referrer is indistinguishable from regular DuckDuckGo search and would overcount. Only the duck.ai chat host matches.

platforms.label: Grok
platforms.notes: x.com/twitter.com deliberately excluded: social referrals are not AI assistant referrals.
